description: Style NoteLove the understated and the subtle? Try jealous 21's capris with a pocket detail on the side! Designed to contour the hips and Fit the waist to perfection, the label gets it right every time - you might not want to take these off once you pull them on! It goes perfectly with your T-shirts and dressy tops. Style this tastefully with in-season accessories and heels.Product DetailsBeige capris with loops at the waist band, button and zipper closure on the front, two pockets on the sides and two at the back and two flap pockets at the knee regionMaterial and Care75% cotton, 23% spandex, 2% spandexWash dark colours separatelyMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shadeTumble dry lowSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and wasit 26") is wearing a size 28
